query: dashboard repository explorer tab layout graph sidebar overview default

results.title: GitNexus-style structural graph canvas
results.content: Refactored dashboard graph canvases to feel closer to GitNexus by adding repository/folder/file context nodes, hierarchy-aware placement, GitNexus-inspired node size/color mapping, relation-styled edges, and larger structural graph canvases for both search and impact views. Files: src/dashboard/src/scripts/repositories-page.ts, src/dashboard/src/components/RepositoryGraphExplorerShell.astro, docs/progress/architecture-transition-cli-edge-sync.md

results.title: Repository-first graph explorer and repo CRUD
results.content: Added admin repository detail/update/delete plus graph-map payloads so the dashboard can render a full repo graph by default. Backend files: src/minder/application/admin/dto.py, src/minder/application/admin/use_cases.py, src/minder/presentation/http/admin/api.py, src/minder/store/interfaces.py, src/minder/store/graph.py, src/minder/tools/graph.py, tests/integration/test_http_admin_expansion.py. Frontend files: src/dashboard/src/lib/api/admin.ts, src/dashboard/src/components/RepositoryGraphExplorerShell.astro, src/dashboard/src/scripts/repositories-page.ts. Validation: pytest integration, ruff, mypy, bun check.

results.title: Components docs page uses left content and sticky right menu
results.content: Updated src/app/components/page.tsx into a documentation-style layout with main content on the left and a sticky 'On this page' navigation menu on the right. The right menu tracks active sections via IntersectionObserver, and the main content currently wraps the Combobox demo and API notes as a reusable docs-page pattern.

results.title: Repository graph explorer flow
results.content: Added admin repository graph read APIs and Astro dashboard explorer for synced repo graphs. Backend: src/minder/application/admin/use_cases.py adds summary/search/impact methods backed by GraphTools; src/minder/presentation/http/admin/api.py exposes /v1/admin/repositories/{repo_id}/graph-summary, graph-search, and graph-impact. Frontend: src/dashboard/src/lib/api/admin.ts adds typed graph client calls; src/dashboard/src/components/RepositoryGraphExplorerShell.astro, src/dashboard/src/pages/repositories/index.astro, and src/dashboard/src/scripts/repositories-page.ts add the repository explorer UI. Validation: uv run pytest tests/integration/test_http_admin_expansion.py, uv run ruff check ..., uv run mypy ..., cd src/dashboard && bun run check.

results.title: Repository-first dashboard entry and unified header
results.content: Made /dashboard and post-login browser flow land on /dashboard/repositories instead of /dashboard/clients. Updated src/minder/presentation/http/admin/dashboard.py, src/dashboard/src/scripts/dashboard-entry.ts, and src/dashboard/src/scripts/login-page.ts to keep server-side and client-side redirects aligned. Refactored src/dashboard/src/layouts/DashboardLayout.astro with showPageIntro so pages with their own hero sections do not render a duplicate title block, and enabled that mode across the registry/detail/dashboard shells. Updated transition trackers to mark the delivered transition phases DONE and moved remaining enhancements into backlog language. Validation: bun run check, uv run pytest tests/integration/test_setup_dashboard_gate.py tests/integration/test_http_admin_expansion.py, uv run ruff check ..., uv run mypy src/minder/presentation/http/admin/dashboard.py.
